rationale: Review 2's one material point—un-privating general lemmas like BialgHom.map_antipode and Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_id/map_comp—would improve TauCeti-internal reuse, but its other findings (deleting includeRight_apply, dropping or restructuring map_tmul/map_toAlgHom/map_toCoalgHom/antipode_tmul) are either neutral or risk removing useful specialized API lemmas whose proofs already correctly delegate to Mathlib. The net quality difference after acting on either review is negligible.
